ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Electronics, Clothing) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product (e.g., Smartphone, T-Shirt) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (if applicable) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program associated with the customer */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Purchase history of the customer */,
  "preferred_channel" TEXT /* Preferred sales channel of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature_cel" INTEGER /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "program_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the loyalty program */,
  "program_rewards" TEXT /* Rewards offered by the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sales" (
  "customer_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_sales" (
  "region_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region sale */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region manager */,
  "region_target" REAL /* Sales target for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_sales_region_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, executive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view sales data, edit products) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Category of the product (e.g., Electronics, Clothing)
Subcategory of the product (e.g., Smartphone, T-Shirt)
